title: iDesign Desk Drawer Organiser for Makeup and Kitchen Utensils, Small Storage Tray Dividers made of Durable Plastic, Clear, X-Small: 10.2 cm x 20.3 cm
features: No More Chaos: This drawer divider is perfect for keeping many items stored neatly and tidily; It keeps order in drawers and wardrobes, providing a great storage option
Multi-Purpose: The drawer tray is versatile; thanks to its design it can be used as a cutlery tray, a kitchen organiser, for bathroom storage, in the office and more
Stackable Storage: The storage drawer insert is an ideal solution to chaos; it is shaped ideally for stacking and can be placed one on top of another for even more storage
Compact Size: The plastic storage box is measured at 10.2 cm x 20.3 cm x 5.1 cm; It is extra small and ideal for slotting into bedside table drawers or desk drawers
Quality Materials: The drawer organiser is made of a robust, durable plastic that is BPA-free; It won't break or get damaged easily and is simply cleaned with a damp cloth
description: From the manufacturer iDesign small drawer box Ideal for cutlery and other utensils in the kitchen and office With this storage box from iDesign, bringing order to the office, bathroom and kitchen is child’s play. The box is stackable, fits in the drawer and can be combined with other organisers. Thanks to the transparent design, the contents are always visible, and the robust plastic construction means that the organiser can also be used as a cutlery tray. About the Clarity series: The simple and clear-cut design of these organisers combines a modern style with practical function. The items in this series have a simple look but lots to offer. They allow efficient and separate storage of differently-sized office, bathroom and cosmetic items and are essential helpers in any home. The product details Drawer box for kitchen, office and more Dimensions: 10.2 cm x 20.3 cm x 5.1 cm Use on its own or combine with other organisers Material: Plastic Stackable organiser Neat storage for utensils Stackable and compatible with other organisers Many uses throughout the home iDesign – live simply At iDesign, we started to develop innovative household storage products over 40 years ago. Value for money has always been a key factor for us. We design storage solutions for daily use. This includes products for the bathroom, kitchen, pantry, wardrobe and more. With our innovative products, we hope to help tidy and at the same time beautify the home. The combination of modern trends with good quality and high functionality is the cornerstone of our collections.
